---
title: "Archive"
subtitle: "Earlier versions of these materials"
toc: false
---

The current course lives at the [Summer 2026 page](../summer_2026/index.qmd).
This page preserves the previous version of the course so existing links
keep working.

## 2024 — Intro to Computer Science notebooks

Twelve Jupyter notebooks from the prior course. The current course
(Summer 2026) is a substantial redesign; these are kept for reference.

- [Browse the 2024 notebooks on GitHub](https://github.com/brendanpshea/computing_concepts_python/tree/main/archive/2024_intro_cs_notebooks)

## 2024 — Case studies (PDF)

Twelve case studies authored for the 2024 course, distributed as PDFs.
Most of the topics live on in different form in the
[current case studies](../summer_2026/cases/index.qmd); two
(Functionalism, War & Technology) have been dropped from the new
sequence.

- [Browse the 2024 case studies on GitHub](https://github.com/brendanpshea/computing_concepts_python/tree/main/archive/2024_case_studies)

---

*Licensed under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).*
